name: German Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp low-calorie mayonnaise or sour cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and dice the potatoes into cubes.
2. Boil the potatoes until tender, then drain the water off.
3. Chop the scallions into fine pieces and sauté them in olive oil until browned.
4. Mix the boiled potatoes with the sautéed scallions.
5. Add vinegar, sugar, and dill to the potato mixture.
6. Stir everything together.
7. Add mayonnaise (or sour cream) and mix well.
Makes: 6 to 8 servings
